name: accint
description: Local Work Model MCP server for agent work that learns from real outcomes.
long_description: AccInt exposes a local Work Model to MCP clients. Agents use acc_retrieve to read the scored substrate and acc_act to solve, execute bounded local work, register reusable runtimes, and close outcomes. The database stays on the user's machine; this bundle ships the local acc binary only, not any acc.db substrate.

tools.name: acc_retrieve
tools.description: Retrieve scored Work Model context by late interaction.

tools.name: acc_act
tools.description: Run a Work Model action such as solve, continue, exec, register, or outcome.

db_path.title: AccInt database
db_path.description: Path to the local AccInt SQLite substrate (acc.db). Use an existing acc.db or create one with the installer first.
